title: S + V + rather than + V / N

formulas.formula: S + V + rather than + V（原形）/ N
formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 + rather than + 原形動詞/名詞，表示「而不是……」，強調選擇優先
Rather than 置句首，後接動名詞，主要子句中動詞為原形，強調轉折選擇

explanation: rather than 表達「而不是、寧可……而不……」的概念，用於強調兩個選項間的優先選擇。主要特點：連接相同詞性（動詞連動詞、名詞連名詞），rather than 後接原形動詞或名詞短語；若置句首須用 rather than + V-ing 形式，主要子句動詞保持原形。易混淆點在於不可在 rather than 後用現在分詞或完成式，且應注意與 instead of 的區別——rather than 強調抉擇，instead of 強調替代。

examples.eng: I prefer to stay home rather than go to the crowded party.
examples.chi: 我寧可待在家裡，也不願去那個擁擠的派對。

examples.eng: She chose to study medicine rather than pursue art as her career.
examples.chi: 她選擇學習醫學，而不是從事藝術作為職業。

examples.eng: Rather than wasting time online, he decided to read books and improve himself.
examples.chi: 與其浪費時間在網路上，他決定讀書來充實自己。

examples.eng: They want quality rather than quantity in their daily purchases.
examples.chi: 他們在日常購物中追求品質而不是數量。

extension.tip: 判斷技巧：rather than 後需使用與前面相同詞性的詞彙。若前為原形動詞，後也須原形動詞（非現在分詞或過去式）。置句首時必須使用 Rather than + V-ing 形式。常見錯誤是在 rather than 後錯用時態或詞性，導致句子結構不當。

examples.test: ❌ I prefer to stay home rather than going out.
examples.result: → ✓ I prefer to stay home rather than go out.（rather than 後需原形動詞 go，不能用 going）

examples.test: ❌ Rather than to waste time, he studies hard.
examples.result: → ✓ Rather than wasting time, he studies hard.（句首須用 V-ing 形式 wasting，不能用 to waste）

examples.test: ✓ She chose quality rather than price in her selection.
examples.result: → 正確用法：連接名詞 quality 和 price，詞性一致

extension.note: 記憶口訣：rather than 後詞性要一致，置句首加 V-ing，置中間用原形動詞。

exercises.sentence: I would prefer to watch television rather than work on my homework.
exercises.translation: 我寧可看電視，也不願做功課。

parts: complaints, she decided to take action and solve the problem.
exercises.sentence: Rather than voicing complaints, she decided to take action and solve the problem.
exercises.translation: 與其抱怨，她決定採取行動解決問題。

parts: The company chose to invest in
exercises.sentence: The company chose to invest in innovation rather than make cuts during the recession.
exercises.translation: 在衰退期間，該公司選擇投資創新，而不是裁員。

exercises.sentence: Most students favor learning practical skills rather than memorizing only theoretical knowledge.
exercises.translation: 大多數學生偏好學習實用技能，而不是只死記理論知識。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式：選項應使用 rather than 正確結構
mc_exercises.question_eng: I prefer to watch movies at home rather than _______ to the cinema.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (go)。Rather than 後須接原形動詞，與前面的 to watch 保持平行結構。A 項 going 是現在分詞，rather than 後不可用；C 項 to go 重複了不定詞符號；D 項 went 是過去式，不符合文法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷句型結構：rather than 連接相同詞性
mc_exercises.question_eng: She decided to pursue a career in law rather than _______ her family business.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (manage)。Rather than 連接兩個相同詞性的動詞，第一個是 pursue (原形)，第二個也須是原形 manage。A 項 managing 是現在分詞；B 項 to manage 多了不定詞符號；D 項 having managed 是完成式分詞，都不符合 rather than 的文法要求。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別 rather than 與 instead of 用法差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: The company prefers to invest in technology _______ hiring more staff to reduce costs.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (rather than)。Rather than 表示優先選擇，強調前項被選中、後項被拒絕。B 項 instead of 後接名詞或動名詞，但在此句需搭配原形動詞，文意上也不如 rather than 恰當。C 項 other than 是「除了」；D 項 apart from 也是「除了」，都不表示選擇。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 進階題：rather than 置句首之倒裝用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ admit his mistake, he chose to defend himself stubbornly despite the evidence.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (Rather than admitting)。當 rather than 置句首時，須採 Rather than + V-ing 的倒裝形式。A 項加 to 錯誤；C 項應接現在分詞；D 項完成式分詞不符合句型。此結構強調通過動名詞與主要子句動詞的對比，表達強烈的優先順序。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我寧可在家讀書，也不要去嘈雜的咖啡館。
translation_exercises.answer: I would rather study at home than go to a noisy café.
hints: 句型框架：S + would rather + V + than + V（原形）
注意：rather than 後接原形動詞 go，不能用 going

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 與其花錢買新手機，她寧可存錢去旅遊。
translation_exercises.answer: Rather than buying a new phone, she prefers to save money for a trip.
hints: 句型框架：Rather than + V-ing, S + V（主要動詞保持原形或適當時態）
注意：句首使用 Rather than + buying（-ing形式），主句動詞用 prefers to save

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這間公司更看重員工的創新能力，而不是單純的工作經驗。
translation_exercises.answer: This company values innovation rather than work experience in its employees.
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N rather than + N（連接兩個名詞詞組，強調優先選擇）
注意：rather than 後接名詞 work experience，不能加動詞形式

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 與其被動地接受老師的講解，學生應該主動提問和批判性思考，以便更深入理解課程內容。
translation_exercises.answer: Rather than passively accepting the teacher's explanation, students should ask questions and think critically to gain a deeper understanding of the course content.
key_points: Rather than + V-ing 句首結構
ask questions and think critically（並列動詞原形）
hints: 句型框架：Rather than + V-ing (複雜動詞片語), S + should + V + and + V（主句可含並列結構或助動詞）
注意：rather than 後的 accepting 使用 -ing 形式，但主句動詞 should ask 和 think 保持原形；此句強調對比的教育理念
